# Veloxis Global

> Veloxis Global is an India-based, results-driven digital marketing agency specializing in Search Engine Optimization (SEO), high-ROAS Google/Meta paid advertising campaigns, and custom CRM/AI automations.

## Core Services

- [Search Engine Optimization (SEO)](https://veloxisglobal.com/services/seo): Technical SEO audits, local map packs, and long-tail keyword indexing across Northern India.
- [Google Ads & PPC](https://veloxisglobal.com/services/google-ads-ppc): Certified Google Search, Display, and Performance Max (PMax) campaign setups.
- [Social Media Marketing (SMM)](https://veloxisglobal.com/services/social-media-marketing): High-converting Meta ads targeting localized custom audiences.
- [Web Design & Development](https://veloxisglobal.com/services/web-design-development): Fast, mobile-responsive, conversion-optimized Next.js React websites.
- [Email & WhatsApp Marketing](https://veloxisglobal.com/services/email-marketing): N8n-powered custom databases, automated follow-ups, and lead routing.
- [Content Marketing](https://veloxisglobal.com/services/content-marketing): Authority SEO blogs, copywriting, and lead magnet collateral.

## Location Frameworks

- [Delhi NCR](https://veloxisglobal.com/digital-marketing-agency-delhi): Regional strategies focusing on real estate lead generation, local SEO, and paid media.
- [Noida](https://veloxisglobal.com/digital-marketing-agency-noida): Conversion pipelines and WhatsApp automation for EdTech academies and startups.
- [Lucknow](https://veloxisglobal.com/digital-marketing-agency-lucknow): Patient bookings and local citation audits for hospitals and clinic chains.
- [Kanpur](https://veloxisglobal.com/digital-marketing-agency-kanpur): B2B lead generation and technical SEO for manufacturing exporters and mills.

## Founder & E-E-A-T Credentials

- **Founder & CEO**: Muddassir Ali (digital marketing specialist with over 6 years of expertise in paid media, local SEO, and workflow automation).
- **Credentials**: Google Ads Search Certified, Google Analytics 4 (GA4) Individual Qualification, HubSpot Academy.
